options.name: --input-format
options.description:
Format of the input data (json,
xml, yaml, messagepack, cbor, protobuf, bxml,
toml)

options.name: --output-format
options.description:
Desired format for the output data
(json, xml, yaml, messagepack, cbor,
protobuf, bxml, toml)
-o FILE, --output=FILE           Output file path (if not specified, will be
auto-generated based on input file name)

options.name: --force
options.description:
Overwrite output file if it already exists
-v LEVEL, --verbosity=LEVEL      Set verbosity level (None, Error, Warning,
Info, Debug, Trace)

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version info and exit

options.name: --list-formats
options.description: List all supported formats and exit

options.name: --encoding
options.description:
(Default: utf-8) Input/output file encoding
(utf-8, utf-16, ascii, etc.)

options.name: --indent
options.description:
Indentation size for formatted output (JSON,
XML, YAML). Use 0 for tabs

options.name: --minify
options.description:
Minify output by removing unnecessary
whitespace

options.name: --pretty
options.description:
Pretty print output with proper formatting
and indentation

options.name: --no-metadata
options.description:
Strip metadata, comments, and processing
instructions from output

options.name: --sort-keys
options.description: Sort object keys alphabetically in output

options.name: --json-escape-unicode
options.description: Escape non-ASCII characters in JSON output

options.name: --json-allow-trailing-commas
options.description:
Allow trailing commas in JSON input
(non-standard but commonly used)

options.name: --json-strict-property-names
options.description:
(Default: true) Require quoted property names
in JSON input (default: true, set to false to
allow unquoted names)

options.name: --json-allow-single-quotes
options.description:
Allow single quotes in JSON input
(non-standard, only works with direct string
parsing)

options.name: --xml-root
options.description: Custom root element name for XML output

options.name: --xml-namespace
options.description: XML namespace URI for output

options.name: --xml-namespace-prefix
options.description: XML namespace prefix

options.name: --xml-declaration
options.description:
Include XML declaration (<?xml
version='1.0'?>)

options.name: --xml-standalone
options.description: Set standalone='yes' in XML declaration

options.name: --xml-cdata
options.description:
Wrap text content in CDATA sections when
necessary

options.name: --xml-attributes
options.description:
Convert simple properties to XML attributes
instead of elements

options.name: --yaml-preserve-leading-zeros
options.description:
(Default: true) Preserve leading zeros in
numeric strings (e.g., '01234' stays as
string)

options.name: --yaml-flow-style
options.description: Use flow style (inline) for YAML output

options.name: --yaml-explicit-start
options.description:
Include explicit document start marker (---)
in YAML

options.name: --yaml-explicit-end
options.description:
Include explicit document end marker (...) in
YAML

options.name: --yaml-quote-strings
options.description: Force quoting of all string values in YAML

options.name: --yaml-canonical
options.description: Use canonical YAML format

options.name: --yaml-allow-duplicate-keys
options.description: Allow duplicate keys in YAML

options.name: --toml-array-of-tables
options.description:
(Default: true) Convert object arrays to TOML
array of tables format ([[table]])

options.name: --toml-multiline-strings
options.description:
(Default: false) Use multiline string format
("""...""") for long strings

options.name: --toml-strict-types
options.description:
(Default: false) Enforce strict type
conversion (fail if types cannot be
represented in TOML)

options.name: --toml-array-wrapper-key
options.description: Wrap root array; uses 'item' if not specified

options.name: --msgpack-contractless
options.description:
(Default: true) Use contractless resolver for
MessagePack (allows dynamic types)

options.name: --msgpack-old-spec
options.description: Use old MessagePack specification format

options.name: --cbor-indefinite-length
options.description:
(Default: true) Allow indefinite-length
arrays and maps in CBOR

options.name: --cbor-multiple-content
options.description:
Allow multiple top-level CBOR items in
sequence

options.name: --cbor-canonical
options.description:
Use canonical CBOR encoding (sorted keys,
minimal encoding)

options.name: --cbor-tags
options.description: Preserve CBOR semantic tags in conversion

options.name: --cbor-datetime-tag
options.description:
Use CBOR datetime tags (tag 0 or 1) for date
values

options.name: --cbor-bignum
options.description:
Use CBOR bignum tags (tag 2/3) for very large
numbers

options.name: --bxml-endian
options.description:
(Default: littleendian) Use 'littleendian'
for Intel/x86 systems (default) or
'bigendian' for network order and some RISC
architectures.

options.name: --bxml-compressArrays
options.description:
(Default: true) Enables compression for
homogeneous arrays to reduce output size

options.name: --compress
options.description:
Compress output using specified algorithm
(gzip, deflate, brotli, lz4)

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Enable strict validation mode (fail on
warnings)

options.name: --ignore-errors
options.description:
Continue processing even if non-critical
errors occur

options.name: --streaming
options.description:
Use streaming parser for large files (reduces
memory usage)

options.name: --chunk-size
options.description:
(Default: 100) Number of items per chunk when
streaming

options.name: --number-format
options.description:
Number format for output (decimal,
hexadecimal, scientific, binary, raw)

options.name: --date-format
options.description:
Date format string (e.g., 'yyyy-MM-dd',
'ISO8601', 'unix')

options.name: --timezone
options.description:
Target timezone for date conversion (e.g.,
'UTC', 'America/New_York')

options.name: --array-wrap
options.description: Wrap single items in arrays when converting

options.name: --flatten-arrays
options.description: Flatten nested arrays in output

options.name: --max-depth
options.description: Maximum nesting depth for objects/arrays

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.
